patterns.test_harness_pattern: Test harness creates temp .cards dir, initializes with bop init, writes template, creates card, runs dispatcher, polls for completion
patterns.prompt_template_location: Template spec.md content is written in write_template function (line 307-310)
patterns.verification_pattern: assert_result checks for output/result.md existence and non-empty content

existing_implementations.description: Test infrastructure exists at scripts/test-real-adapters.nu. Mock adapter works. Claude adapter exists but may not be creating output/result.md due to prompt clarity.
key_findings: claude.nu adapter unsets CLAUDECODE env var to allow nested sessions
Test template prompt (line 307-310) says 'Use file creation tools' but spec suggests it should say 'Use the Write tool'
Mock adapter test passes - infrastructure works
Claude adapter test likely fails because Claude doesn't understand 'file creation tools' as clearly as 'Write tool'

task_scope.description: Update the prompt template in test-real-adapters.nu to be more explicit about using the Write tool, then verify the test passes
